noOrgs: You're not a member of any organization yet.

dashboard.title: {{org}} — Dashboard
dashboard.empty: No data yet. Invite members to get started.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Invite, promote, or remove people under this organization.
members.empty: No members yet. Click Invite to add your first person.
members.removeConfirmMessage: {{name}} will lose access to organization courses immediately. Their personal enrollments are not affected.

dialog.title: Invite a new member
dialog.description: They'll receive an email invite. If they don't have an account yet, we'll create one when they accept.

settings.title: Organization settings
settings.subtitle: Update contact info, branding, and revenue splits.
settings.feeHelp: For Teaching Institutions: platform + org + teacher splits must sum to 100%. Employers keep both fees at 0.

catalog.title: Browse courses
catalog.subtitle: License seats for courses on the public catalog, or create your own internal courses.
catalog.comingSoon: License checkout is being finalized. You can already browse the public catalog from the student portal.

licenses.title: Course licenses
licenses.subtitle: Bulk-purchased seats you can assign to your members.
licenses.comingSoon: Seat management UI is on the way — the data model already tracks seat totals and usage.
licenses.empty: You haven't licensed any courses yet. Pick one from the catalog below.
licenses.catalogEmpty: No paid courses are currently published.
licenses.noAssignments: No one is assigned yet. Click Assign seats to enroll team members.
licenses.purchasedToast: License purchased. You can assign seats now.
licenses.revokedToast: Assignment revoked. Seat is available again.
licenses.revokeConfirmMessage: {{name}} will lose access to this course and their seat will be returned to the pool. Progress is preserved but will not be shared with this assignment.

purchaseDialog.title: License a course for your team
purchaseDialog.description: Buying seats for "{{course}}". Employees won't pay anything — they enroll for free once you assign a seat.

assignDialog.title: Assign seats
assignDialog.description: Pick members to enroll. {{available}} seat(s) available.
assignDialog.noEligible: All active members already have a seat on this course.

compliance.title: Training compliance
compliance.subtitle: See who finished what, who's overdue, and export for audits.
compliance.comingSoon: Compliance dashboard is on the way — needs an assigned license to populate with data.

createOrg.title: Create an organization
createOrg.subtitle: Set up a teaching institution or a company training account.
